use_cases: Personal portfolio about sections with expandable biography details
FAQ pages for websites needing organized question-answer content
Team or services listing pages with expandable descriptions
Contact information sections with expandable contact methods
ai_summary: A minimalist accordion component for displaying collapsible content sections. Built with Radix UI primitives, it features smooth expand/collapse animations, single-selection behavior with one item open by default, and a clean design ideal for personal portfolios, FAQ sections, or any content-heavy page. The component renders eight expandable items with titles and detailed content, optimized for both desktop and mobile viewing.
